backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the portfolio backend, managing artworks (CRUD with inline image bytes), text content, media contacts, logo/cover/portrait blobs, and user profiles with role-based access control via admin/user permissions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping each redesign feature (navigation, hero, about, services, etc.) to the specific frontend files and components involved, along with test IDs and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's visual redesign and preserved functionality for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes (backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, charts, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Khudrang Kalakaar Portfolio', mounting the app at the `#root` div and loading the TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (`/`, `/admin-login`, `/admin`) and composes the portfolio page from all section components including QRSection between ArtworkGallery and ContactSection.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Static about section with a two-column layout featuring a decorative portrait block with corner accents, a floating experience badge, bio text, and a three-stat row using Playfair Display and terracotta styling.
frontend/src/components/ArtworkGallery.t: Displays a responsive grid gallery of artworks fetched via a query hook, converting binary image data to object URLs. Supports clicking any artwork to open a full-detail dialog view.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders a contact section with cards for location, WhatsApp, and Instagram, dynamically loading contact details from a query hook with fallback defaults.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProjects: Renders a 'Featured Projects' section by mapping a static list of five mural projects to ProjectSection components with alternating image layouts.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with branding, navigation links, social media icons, and contact info loaded from query hooks. Includes a hidden double-tap/click on the logo to navigate to the admin login page.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section displaying the artist's name, tagline, and CTA buttons (WhatsApp and gallery link), with a dynamic background cover image and contact info loaded from query hooks.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, a mobile hamburger menu, WhatsApp CTA button, and a hidden double-tap logo interaction that navigates to the admin login route.
frontend/src/components/ProjectSection.t: Renders a single project entry as a two-column article with a large image (65%) and a text panel (35%), supporting alternating layout via a `reverse` prop and displaying a numbered badge, location, and description.
frontend/src/components/QRSection.tsx: Displays a section with a QR code linking to the artist's Instagram profile (fetched via `useMediaContacts`) alongside a follow call-to-action button, with loading skeletons while data is fetching.
Renders a dark-background services grid listing seven offering types (e.g., murals, 3D illusions, café walls), each with an icon, title, description, and hover animation.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Displays a 'Why Trust Us' section with six static trust-point cards (experience, quality, pricing, etc.) arranged in a responsive grid with hover accent animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisted identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data (text content, artworks, logo, cover image, media contacts), each delegating to the actor from `useActor`.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollSpy.ts: Custom hook that tracks which section ID is currently in view by comparing scroll position against each section's `offsetTop`, returning the active section ID.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for the warm artisanal color palette (terracotta, gold, cream), and adds utility classes like section-padding and accent-bar.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page with a hardcoded username/password check that stores authentication state in sessionStorage and redirects to the admin panel on success.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Full admin panel page with tabbed UI for managing gallery artworks (upload/edit/delete), logo, cover image, artist portrait, text content, and media contacts using custom React Query hooks connected to the backend.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read, store, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts (Inter, Playfair Display), oklch-based color tokens (terracotta, gold, sidebar, chart), border radius variables, custom box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting the portfolio site's architecture (ICP backend, Firebase storage), existing features, known issues with build failures, and version history for the Khudrang Kalakaar mural artist portfolio.
